# Secondary Glazing Specialist

> London's leading secondary glazing installer for listed buildings, conservation areas, and period properties — delivering 54dB noise reduction and up to 60% heat retention with discreet, reversible designs.

We specialise in heritage-sensitive secondary glazing for Grade I and Grade II listed buildings, Victorian, Georgian, Edwardian and Crittall properties across London and the Home Counties. Solutions are planning-compliant, fully reversible, and engineered to BS 8233 (acoustic) and Part L (thermal) standards.

## Core Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, products, and London coverage.
- [About](/about): Heritage credentials, team, and accreditations.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone 020 3929 3960, enquiry form, London office.
- [Quote Request](/quote-request): Free no-obligation specification quote.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Completed installations across heritage properties.
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Listed building, hospitality and commercial projects.
- [FAQs](/faqs): Common questions on planning, installation and performance.
- [Compliance Hub](/compliance-hub): Planning, LBC, Part L/F/K, PAS 2035, BS 8233, Article 4 guidance.

## Specialist Services

- [Listed Buildings Secondary Glazing](/listed-buildings-secondary-glazing): Grade I & II compliant installations.
- [Conservation Areas Secondary Glazing](/conservation-areas-secondary-glazing): Planning-approved heritage solutions.
- [Sash Window Secondary Glazing](/sash-window-secondary-glazing): Slimline systems for original sashes.
- [Victorian Windows Secondary Glazing](/victorian-windows-secondary-glazing): Sympathetic upgrades for Victorian homes.
- [Georgian Windows Secondary Glazing](/georgian-windows-secondary-glazing): Multi-pane Georgian solutions.
- [Edwardian Property Secondary Glazing](/edwardian-property-secondary-glazing): Edwardian-era specifications.
- [Thermal Insulation Secondary Glazing](/thermal-insulation-secondary-glazing): Up to 60% heat loss reduction.
- [Noise Reduction Secondary Glazing](/noise-reduction-secondary-glazing): Up to 54dB acoustic reduction.

## Specialised Glazing

- [Acoustic Glazing](/specialized/acoustic-glazing): 10.8mm Stadip Silence solutions.
- [Thermal Insulation](/specialized/thermal-insulation): Pilkington K Glass low-emissivity systems.
- [Security Glazing](/specialized/security-glazing): BS EN 356 P1A–P5A laminated glass.
- [UV Protection](/specialized/uv-protection): Up to 99% UV blocking for art and interiors.
- [Condensation Control](/specialized/condensation-control): BS 5250 compliant moisture management.
- [Air Gap Secondary Glazing](/specialized/air-gap-secondary-glazing): Optimum 100mm cavity performance.
- [Sound Transmission Guide](/specialized/sound-transmission-guide): Rw, STC and dB explained.
- [Insurance Premiums](/specialized/insurance-premiums): How glazing affects buildings cover.
- [Building Regulations](/specialized/secondary-glazing-building-regulations): Part L, F, K and Q compliance.
- [Original Windows](/specialized/secondary-glazing-original-windows): Preserving historic joinery.
